mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-OSCourse SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-OSCourse SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-OSCourse SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Chen Zheng, Siyang Tian, Zheng Zhenyu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
